communities.name: Brahmin - Vaishnav
communities.characteristics: Strictly satvik; no meat, no onion, no garlic; Tulsi is sacred

unique_items.reason: Mandatory for Vaishnav puja; Vishnu loves Tulsi
Vishnu's preferred flowers
For abhishekam of Vishnu idol
Prasad must be satvik (pure vegetarian, no onion/garlic)
Vishnu is dressed in yellow (Pitambara)

communities.name: Brahmin - Shaivite
communities.characteristics: Bilva leaves essential; Abhishekam with water/milk central ritual

unique_items.reason: MOST important for Shiva puja; symbolizes Shiva's trident
Shiva accepts white flowers; marigold not preferred
Applied to forehead; Shiva's signature item
Rudraksha mala for japa; sacred to Shiva
Continuous milk bathing of Shivalinga
One of the Panchamrut items for Shiva
Offered to Shiva; used in Mahamrityunjaya homa

communities.name: Brahmin - Smarta
communities.deity: Panchayatana (5 deities: Ganesha, Vishnu, Shiva, Devi, Surya)
communities.characteristics: Worship all deities; most flexible in community

unique_items.reason: Items for all 5 deities in one puja
Used for Ganesha and Devi respectively
Different flowers for different deities
Devi/Shakti is worshipped with red; offered red cloth
Devi worship requires lots of kumkum
Some Kshatriya communities offer non-vegetarian prasad to Kali/Durga
Devi's preferred flower

communities.name: Vaishya (Komati, Baniya, Chettiars, etc.)
communities.characteristics: Merchant community; Lakshmi worship prominent; commercial prosperity emphasis

unique_items.reason: Lakshmi puja with gold items for prosperity
Lakshmi's flower; mandatory in Lakshmi puja
Coins placed in ritual pot for wealth
Specific to Komati community - Ganesha idol made from turmeric
Specific ritual use by Komati community

communities.name: OBC / Backward Classes (Nayee Brahmin, Vishwakarma, Yadav, Kuruma, etc.)
communities.characteristics: Community-specific deity worship; often worships occupational deities

unique_items.reason: On Vishwakarma Jayanti, tools are worshipped
Each community has specific clan deity requiring specific items
Core items same as mainstream

communities.name: Scheduled Caste / Scheduled Tribe
communities.characteristics: Diverse traditions; many follow Ambedkarite Buddhism or Christianity now; traditional families continue Hindu customs

unique_items.reason: For those following Hindu traditions
Used extensively for purification in many SC communities
Ancestral offerings common

budget_tiers.description: Essential items only; suitable for small family ceremony or daily puja
Complete items for the occasion; suitable for family with 20-50 guests
includes: Proper kit for the specific occasion

budget_tiers.description: Premium quality + complete regional items + all traditional requirements
